tagline: Backyards were made for back floats

hero.headline: Long Island's Pool Experts Since 1987
hero.subheadline: For nearly 40 years, over 5,000 families have trusted Islandia Pools to design, build, and maintain their backyard retreats. From custom pools to weekly service, we handle everything so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Design, Build, Maintain & Repair —<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From your first sketch to your thousandth swim, Islandia Pools handles every phase of pool ownership so you never have to juggle multiple contractors.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design & Build
cards.description: Award-winning designers create your dream pool from concept to first splash. Every detail tailored to your yard, your style, and your budget.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Complete spa and hot tub sales, delivery, and professional installation. Extend your backyard season and unwind year-round in total luxury.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks that keep your pool sparkling and swim-ready every single week of the season.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Diagnostics
cards.description: Expert troubleshooting for pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing, and surfaces. Fast turnaround so your pool is back in action without the wait.

cards.title: Retail Pool Supply Store
cards.description: Visit our fully stocked Riverhead store for chemicals, accessories, equipment, and expert advice from people who actually know pools.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Professional spring openings and winter closings that protect your investment and ensure your pool is ready the moment warm weather arrives.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your backyard vision. We'll visit your property, discuss options, and provide an honest, detailed quote — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Bring Your Vision to Life
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles design, permitting, construction, and installation with decades of East End expertise. You stay informed at every stage.

steps.title: Dive In & Relax
steps.description: Your new pool is ready. And with our ongoing maintenance programs, it stays crystal clear all season long while you focus on making memories.

about.label: Why Long Island Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1987 — Three Decades of Backyard Transformations
about.description: Founded by John and Boanne Wysoczanski in 1987, Islandia Pools has grown from a small family operation into one of Long Island's most trusted pool companies. Now proudly led by Dave, we've served over 5,000 families across the East End — designing, building, and caring for pools with the same personal attention we'd give our own. When you work with us, you're not a number. You're a neighbor.

features.title: 39 Years of Local Expertise
features.description: Nearly four decades serving the East End means we know Long Island soil, weather, and building codes better than anyone.

features.title: Everything Under One Roof
features.description: Design, build, maintain, repair, and supply — no subcontractors, no runaround. One team handles it all from start to finish.

features.title: 5,000+ Happy Families
features.description: Our customer base speaks for itself. Thousands of Long Island families trust us with their pools season after season.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project and service plan is quoted upfront with clear, honest pricing. No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch — just fair rates from a company that's been earning trust since 1987.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Paradise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service we provide, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation over 39 years on doing right by our customers — and we're not about to stop now. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise; it's the foundation of everything we do.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start a new pool project?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule consultations within a week and can begin construction based on project scope and permitting. For maintenance or repairs, we often have availability within days. Call us and we'll find the fastest path forward.

faqs.question: Do you only serve the East End of Long Island?
faqs.answer: Our primary service area covers Riverhead, the Hamptons, North Fork, South Fork, and communities throughout Suffolk County's East End. If you're nearby and unsure, give us a call — we're happy to check if we can serve your area.

faqs.question: Can I buy pool supplies without being a service customer?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Riverhead retail store is open to everyone. Stop by for chemicals, accessories, equipment, and free expert advice from our knowledgeable staff — whether you're a DIY pool owner or just need a quick supply run.

faqs.question: What makes Islandia Pools different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're a true full-service operation: design, build, maintain, repair, and retail all under one roof. Most companies only do one or two of those. Plus, we've been family-owned since 1987 with over 5,000 satisfied customers and a BBB A+ rating.

faqs.question: Do you offer hot tub and spa services too?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry a full line of spas and hot tubs with professional delivery and installation. We also service and maintain existing spas. Visit our showroom in Riverhead or call us to explore your options.

testimonials.name: Paul Cesario
testimonials.text: From start to finish, things went smooth and on schedule. They do the right thing by putting customers first and any complaint or concern is always taken care of fast.

testimonials.name: Dr. Michelle Iona
testimonials.text: Professional, knowledgeable, and attentive. They helped us design a backyard oasis with clear pricing. We couldn't be happier with the result.

testimonials.name: Tracy Burgess Levy
testimonials.text: Dave, Cheryl and the entire crew at Islandia Pools are professionals who employ great field people, are responsive and knowledgeable as well as dependable. A business that cares about its customers.
